meta/llama-4-maverick.description: Flagship open-weight multimodal model. Features 400B total parameters with balanced general-purpose performance. Supports image understanding and tool calling.
meta/llama-4-maverick.notes: Available for free self-hosted deployment under the Llama Community License. Hosted inference is available through third-party cloud providers.

meta/llama-4-scout.description: Long-context multimodal model with an unprecedented 10 million token context window — roughly equivalent to 75 full-length novels. Supports image understanding and tool calling.
meta/llama-4-scout.notes: Available for free self-hosted deployment under the Llama Community License. Hosted inference is available through third-party cloud providers.

meta/llama-4-behemoth.description: Teacher model previewed by Meta. Represents the largest and most capable model in the Llama 4 family, intended for distillation and research purposes.
meta/llama-4-behemoth.notes: Available for research and enterprise deployments. Pricing not publicly published for API access.

meta/llama-3.3-70b.description: Powerful instruction-tuned model with 70B parameters. Supports 128K context length, multi-language processing, and enhanced tool calling capabilities.
meta/llama-3.3-70b.notes: Available for free self-hosted deployment under the Llama Community License.

meta/llama-3.2.description: Vision model family with 11B and 90B parameter variants. Supports image understanding and multimodal tasks.
meta/llama-3.2.notes: Available for free self-hosted deployment under the Llama Community License.

meta/llama-3.1.description: Open-weight model family with 8B, 70B, and 405B parameter variants. Supports 128K context length, multi-language processing, and tool calling.
meta/llama-3.1.notes: Available for free self-hosted deployment under the Llama Community License.

meta/llama-guard-4.description: Safety and moderation model for filtering harmful content and enforcing safety policies.
meta/llama-guard-4.notes: Available for enterprise deployments and safety-critical applications.

meta/prompt-guard.description: Prompt injection detection model for identifying and mitigating security risks in user inputs.
meta/prompt-guard.notes: Available for enterprise deployments and security-critical applications.

meta-ai.description: Conversational AI assistant powered by Llama 4. Available across WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, Messenger, and the standalone Meta AI app.

meta-ai-app.description: Standalone mobile app for iOS and Android. Features richer responses, image and video generation, voice chat, live AI for real-time answers, and Incognito Chats.

llama.description: Open-weight AI models available for research and commercial use under the Llama Community License.

llama-api.description: Developer API for Llama models. Available as a limited free preview for US-based developers. Partners with cloud providers for inference services.

ai-studio.description: Platform for building and experimenting with AI agents and custom Llama-powered applications.

ai-glasses.description: Ray-Ban Meta AI Glasses integration for hands-free AI assistance. Requires the Meta AI app as a companion app.

image-generation.description: AI-powered image creation and editing. Expanded access available through Meta One subscriptions.

video-generation.description: AI-powered video creation starring users, friends, or anything imaginable. Expanded access available through Meta One subscriptions.

voice-chat.description: Natural voice conversations with support for 13 languages.

live-ai.description: Real-time answers about anything you're looking at.

web-search.description: Real-time web search integration within Meta AI conversations.

memory.description: Persistent memory across conversations for personalized assistance.

incognito-chats.description: Private, temporary conversations that only the user can see.

thinking-mode.description: Step-by-step reasoning for complex questions. Available on the Meta AI app and meta.ai. Expanded access through Meta One subscriptions.[reference:6][reference:7]

developer-api.description: Programmatic access to Meta AI and Llama models through the Llama API.

plans.notes: Meta AI is free across all Meta apps with unlimited conversational chat. Image generation, video creation, and Thinking mode are capped for free users. Available in 200+ countries with multi-language support.

Includes Facebook Plus, Instagram Plus, and WhatsApp Plus benefits at a discounted price[reference:8]. More monthly AI usage allowance for eligible AI features[reference:9]. More advanced reasoning with Thinking mode[reference:10]. Currently in limited testing in select locations[reference:11][reference:12].

All benefits of Meta One Plus, plus: expanded monthly AI usage allowance[reference:13], expanded access to image and video models[reference:14], more advanced reasoning with Thinking mode[reference:15], and features for AI glasses (conversation focus, premium device support)[reference:16]. Currently in limited testing in select locations[reference:17].
Llama models are available under the Llama Community License for free self-hosted deployment. Llama API is available as a limited free preview for US-based developers.

Enterprise deployments are offered through infrastructure and cloud partners including AWS, Azure, Databricks, Snowflake, and Vertex AI. Custom licensing available for organizations above 700 million monthly active users.

models.notes: Self-hosted deployment is free under the Llama Community License. Hosted inference pricing varies by provider.
Self-hosted deployment is free under the Llama Community License. Hosted inference pricing varies by provider.
Self-hosted deployment is free under the Llama Community License.

freeSelfHosting.description: All Llama models are available for free self-hosted deployment under the Llama Community License for organizations below 700 million monthly active users.

cloudInference.description: Meta partners with cloud providers including AWS, Azure, Databricks, Snowflake, and Vertex AI to offer Llama models and inference services.

llamaApiPreview.description: Available as a limited free preview for US-based developers. Provides one-click API key creation and interactive playgrounds.

marketProviders.description: Third-party providers offer hosted Llama inference at competitive rates. Examples include Together AI, Groq, Fireworks, and OpenRouter. Pricing varies by provider and region.
marketProviders.notes: This represents third-party hosted pricing, not official Meta pricing.

apiPricing.notes: Meta does not publish official token pricing for Llama models. Models are available for free self-hosted deployment. Hosted inference is available through third-party providers with pricing set by each provider. The Llama API is currently in preview with rate limits being defined.

notes: Meta AI operates under an advertising-subsidized freemium model. Consumer access is free with unlimited conversational chat. Paid subscriptions (Meta One Plus at $7.99/mo and Meta One Premium at $19.99/mo) provide expanded access to image generation, video creation, and Thinking mode[reference:18][reference:19][reference:20]. Meta One is currently in limited testing and not available everywhere yet[reference:21][reference:22][reference:23]. Llama models are available for free self-hosted deployment under the Llama Community License. The Llama API is in limited preview. All pricing for hosted inference is set by third-party providers, not by Meta.
